# Auto-generated by Rocket-Engine
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.31)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES ON)

# check environment
if(NOT DEFINED ENV{ROCKET_SDK_DIR})
  message(FATAL_ERROR "ROCKET_SDK_DIR environment variable is not set!")
endif()
set(ROCKET_SDK_DIR $ENV{ROCKET_SDK_DIR})

project("%{ProjectName}" CXX)

set(OUTPUT_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${ROCKET_OUTPUT_NAME}")
foreach(OUTPUTCONFIG ${CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES})
  string(TOUPPER ${OUTPUTCONFIG} CONFIG_UPPER)
  set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${CONFIG_UPPER} "${OUTPUT_DIR}")
  set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${CONFIG_UPPER} "${OUTPUT_DIR}/lib")
  set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${CONFIG_UPPER} "${OUTPUT_DIR}/lib")
  set(CMAKE_PDB_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${CONFIG_UPPER}     "${OUTPUT_DIR}")
endforeach()

include("${ROCKET_SDK_DIR}/RocketSDK.cmake")

add_library("%{ProjectName}" SHARED)
add_rocket_engine_to("%{ProjectName}")

file(GLOB_RECURSE SCRIPT_SOURCES "src/*.cpp")
file(GLOB_RECURSE SCRIPT_MODULES "src/*.ixx")

target_sources("%{ProjectName}"
  PRIVATE
    FILE_SET script_modules
    TYPE CXX_MODULES
    BASE_DIRS src
    FILES ${SCRIPT_MODULES}
  PRIVATE
    ${SCRIPT_SOURCES}
)

# solution display
source_group(TREE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"
  FILES
    ${SCRIPT_SOURCES}
    ${SCRIPT_MODULES}
)
